nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for data analysis
nodes.label_negative: Manual detailed review of all information
nodes.grounding_span: quickly go through information that I myself do not need to go in detail

nodes.label: AI as report comparison assistant
nodes.grounding_span: compare them to our usual reports to highlight the differences

nodes.label: AI as drafting assistant for emails
nodes.grounding_span: quickly write email replies that do not need to be personal

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.grounding_span: I generally trust what it has produced

nodes.label: AI as starting point for engineering review
nodes.label_negative: AI as final authority without human verification
nodes.grounding_span: use AI to give a rundown first through things to give me a starting point

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: One-shot AI use for complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: In regards to reports I will collaborate more and fine tune the requirements over multiple passthroughs

nodes.label: AI for data analysis and report writing
nodes.label_negative: AI making unwanted changes to reports
nodes.grounding_span: It is frustrating when it has made unwanted changes to reports I am writing

nodes.label: AI for repetitive simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: automate a lot of trivial stuff

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: saved me time by going through 40 page reports

nodes.label: Engineering accuracy and oversight
nodes.grounding_span: Anything that requires my engineering verification to review I have to handle myself

nodes.label: Focus on important work
nodes.grounding_span: make me focus on the important stuff

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for time-saving
nodes.grounding_span: quite satisfied when it has saved me time by going through 40 page reports

nodes.label: Frustration with AI making unintended changes
nodes.grounding_span: It is frustrating when it has made unwanted changes to reports I am writing

nodes.label: Distrust of AI reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I generally trust what it has produced

nodes.label: Acceptance of human oversight requirement

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: collaborate more and fine tune the requirements over multiple passthroughs

nodes.label: Strategic delegation to focus on high-value work
nodes.grounding_span: embracing using AI to make me focus on the important stuff
